scripts.build: vitepress build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),d='dist',n=p.join(d,'nenebot');fs.mkdirSync(n,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(d).filter(f=>f!=='nenebot').forEach(f=>fs.renameSync(p.join(d,f),p.join(n,f)));fs.writeFileSync(p.join(d,'index.html'),'<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta http-equiv=refresh content=\"0;url=/nenebot/\"><link rel=canonical href=/nenebot/></head><body></body></html>')"
